declaration.source_result: Node-vector concordance and burden results from the prospectively frozen two-class calibration set.
declaration.projected_outcome: Independent reviewers applying the frozen protocol to held-out procurement-contact and ministerial-transcription cases will satisfy every linked use tolerance in each action class.
declaration.bearer: The evidentiary-assurance reviewer protocol, training materials, applicability map, and declared reviewer population.
declaration.unit: One genuine reviewer response to one independently ordered case, retaining the complete applicable-node vector.
declaration.population: Held-out harmless synthetic procurement-contact and ministerial-transcription cases within the frozen stipulated regime.
conditions: Reviewers receive the committed reviewer package but not the hidden reference key.
Action classification, applicability, burdens, and tolerances remain frozen.
Reference comparison occurs only after the declared unblinding boundary.
declaration.time_version_scope: Applicability map 2.0.0, protocol 2.0.0, reference-key set 3.0.0, and the declared independent calibration run.

tolerance.criterion: Conjunctive action-class evaluation of false support, false defeat, gap/defeat confusion, required-node omission, median active-review minutes, and confirmed privacy/security breaches.
tolerance.success_threshold: Every metric is at or below the exactly linked tolerance in both action classes; no class or metric compensates for another.
tolerance.failure_threshold: Any metric exceeds tolerance or either action class is not estimable at the declared minimum reach.

inquiry_use.intended_use: Assess whether the frozen protocol supports bounded node-level calibration use across both declared action classes.
excluded_uses: Historical authorization determination outside the fixture
inquiry_use.evidential_standard: Hidden-key comparison after prospective freezing and unblinding, with noncompensatory class- and metric-level thresholds.
inquiry_use.uncertainty_treatment: Retain node vectors; report case, reviewer, class, and use results plus disagreement and instability; zero genuine responses are NOT_ESTIMATED.
inquiry_use.minimum_useful_reach: Each action class must contain at least four distinct cases, twelve genuine responses, and three distinct reviewers, with at least two reviewers on every observed case; the run must cover every exactly linked construct tag and both members of every required controlled pair at that reviewer minimum, and must satisfy every linked tolerance.

source_evidence: Frozen controlled fixtures and analyzer self-tests covering every metric and failure rule.
target_evidence: Genuine independent reviewer responses on held-out two-class cases after the unblinding boundary.

content: Canonical-node, action-class, and controlled-contrast coverage audit.
substantive: Rationale and citation audit showing reviewers use the intended evidentiary distinctions.
structural: Node-vector analysis preserving support, defeat, gap, conflict, applicability, and historical-reference distinctions.
generalizability: Reviewer-, case-, and action-class variation with held-out harmless transformations.
external: Independent reconstruction or forum-specific comparison under separately declared regimes.
consequential: False reassurance, false defeat, review burden, privacy exposure, and security-incident audit.

prospective_failure_triggers: Any linked tolerance is exceeded in either action class.
The unblinding boundary or content commitment fails.
Either class lacks the declared minimum useful reach.
revision_rule.retirement_condition: Retire the two-class claim after a trigger; any one-class continuation remains only under its separately declared claim.

declaration.source_result: Node-vector concordance and burden results from prospectively frozen procurement-contact calibration cases.
declaration.projected_outcome: Independent reviewers applying the frozen protocol to held-out procurement-contact cases will satisfy every exactly linked procurement-use tolerance.
declaration.bearer: The evidentiary-assurance reviewer protocol, training materials, procurement applicability module, and declared reviewer population.
declaration.unit: One genuine reviewer response to one held-out procurement-contact case, retaining the complete required-node vector.
declaration.population: Held-out harmless synthetic procurement external-contact cases within the frozen stipulated regime.
conditions: Reference keys remain hidden during review.
The procurement action class and required nodes remain frozen.
Comparison occurs only after declared unblinding.

excluded: Post hoc threshold or node change

declaration.time_version_scope: Procurement module v2, applicability map 2.0.0, protocol 2.0.0, and reference-key set 3.0.0.

tolerance.criterion: Conjunctive procurement-class evaluation of all six metrics exactly linked in the applicability map.
tolerance.success_threshold: Every procurement metric is at or below its linked tolerance.
tolerance.failure_threshold: Any procurement metric exceeds tolerance or procurement responses are not estimable at minimum reach.

inquiry_use.intended_use: Assess bounded node-level calibration for procurement external-contact records.
inquiry_use.evidential_standard: Prospectively frozen hidden-key comparison with noncompensatory metric thresholds.
inquiry_use.uncertainty_treatment: Retain node vectors and report reviewer, case, and disagreement structure; zero genuine responses are NOT_ESTIMATED.
inquiry_use.minimum_useful_reach: At least four distinct procurement cases, twelve genuine responses, and three distinct reviewers, with at least two reviewers on every observed case; the run must cover every exactly linked procurement construct tag and both members of every required controlled pair at that reviewer minimum.

source_evidence: Frozen procurement fixtures and metric-specific analyzer self-tests.
target_evidence: Genuine independent responses on held-out procurement cases.

structural: Preserved node vector and gap/defeat distinction.
generalizability: Held-out procurement templates, tokens, and reviewer variation.
external: Separately declared forum- or regime-specific comparison.
consequential: False support, false defeat, burden, privacy, and security audit.

prospective_failure_triggers: Any linked procurement tolerance is exceeded.
The unblinding or content commitment fails.
Minimum useful procurement reach is absent.
revision_rule.retirement_condition: Retire the procurement claim after a trigger unless a new independently tested claim is declared.

declaration.time_version_scope: Base module v2, applicability map 2.0.0, protocol 2.0.0, and reference-key set 3.0.0.

tolerance.success_threshold: Every transcription metric is at or below its linked tolerance.
tolerance.failure_threshold: Any transcription metric exceeds tolerance or transcription responses are not estimable at minimum reach.

source_evidence: Frozen transcription fixtures and metric-specific analyzer self-tests.
target_evidence: Genuine independent responses on held-out transcription cases.

content: Transcription-node, applicability, and isolated record-quality coverage audit.
structural: Preserved node vector, applicability states, and historical-reference separation.
generalizability: Held-out tokens, controlled variants, and reviewer variation.
external: Separately declared forum- or regime-specific comparison.
consequential: False support, false defeat, burden, privacy, and security audit.
